message:
Add dark mode shadow tokens and apply consistent card styling

Introduce symmetric shadow tokens for dark mode (--tnz-shadow-*-dark)
using subtle white glows for visibility on dark backgrounds. Update
LinkCard, ReferenceCard, and Starlight's LinkCard component to use
neutral-800 background in dark mode with the new dark mode shadows,
ensuring consistent elevation and visual hierarchy across all card
components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
